name_en: ❤️B Brand Pure Original Pocket Bag, Cowhide with Canvas, Caramel Coffee + Cream White colorway, retro and high-end yet durable. It has a bit of a cute academic vibe and a strong British tone. Can be sweet or salty, looks great handheld or crossbody! Handheld gives a better street snap vibe, the more you look, the more you like it. Large: 37×9.5×41cm
